options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <object_list> # Specifies the list of cells, nets, or library cells to reset

options.name: -delay_corner
options.description: Specifies the list of delay corners on which reset derating is to be applied

options.name: -increment
options.description: reset the incremental derates applied in all (OCV/AOCV/SOCV) mode.
